name: rsvp_event
description:
Accept, decline, or tentatively accept a Google Calendar event. Also allows for removal of RSVP status.

Parameters:
- event_id: The event ID to respond to (required, you can get it from a search).
- response_status: "accepted", "declined", "tentative", or "needsAction" to remove your RSVP (required).
- calendar_id: Optional calendar ID: use to respond to an event on a specific calendar. A calendar_id is in email format: people's email addresses correspond to their primary calendars. Defaults to the user's primary calendar.

event_id.description: The event ID to respond to (from a previous search result).

response_status.description: Your response: "accepted", "declined", "tentative", or "needsAction" (to remove your RSVP).

calendar_id.description: Calendar ID of the event (e.g. email address from google_calendar_list_calendars). Defaults to the user's primary calendar.
